text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
choice_data_list: Morning. It's rare to catch you humming.
Morning. It's rare to catch you humming.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Eek! T-Trainer?! I-I-I guess I was just reminiscing
on some memories...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You see, I happened to bump into Opera O at the
park yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: And wouldn't you know? I was granted a front-row seat to her performance, The Opera Overlord: Five-Hour Edition!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Reminiscing on that wonderful voice of hers
brings me courage. I'll probably get through
today without making a single mistake!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It sounds like she had herself an exciting day off!
